key_facts: Founded 2020 by a team with 15+ years in electrical measurement technology
Pivoted from industrial energy management into distributed PV monitoring and household energy management
Product suite: high-precision electrical sensors + cloud-based monitoring platform + household energy management SaaS
Angel+ round (September 2023): tens of millions of yuan
Lead investor: Seven Seas Capital (七海资本)
Follow-on investor: Shenzhen Capital Group (深创投 / Shenzhen Venture Capital)
Partners: State Grid, China Electrical Equipment Group (CEEG), Huaneng Group, Tongwei Inc.
Focus: distributed PV monitoring standards development with state utility partners

funding_history.notes: 深创投 (Shenzhen Venture Capital) is one of China's most prestigious government-backed VC funds — validates the company's technology credentials. Seven Seas is a specialist deep-tech fund.

business_model_notes: Sensor-first IoT platform for distributed solar monitoring. Revenue model: hardware (high-precision electrical sensors sold to solar installers/station operators) + SaaS subscription for the monitoring and energy management platform. The state-utility partnerships (State Grid, Huaneng, Tongwei) serve dual purpose: (1) commercial contracts for piloting monitoring technology; (2) credibility/standard-setting influence. Independent of any single OEM, positioned as infrastructure provider for smarter PV monitoring.
competitive_position: Early-stage company in a niche within the O&M monitoring segment. Focus on 'high-precision electrical sensors' suggests more granular data than consumer-grade monitoring (SOLARMAN, SolisCloud). State-utility partnerships differentiate from venture-only competitors. Main uncertainty: can they scale beyond the State Grid pilot projects into the commercial distributed market?
research_notes: Medium confidence. Funding round confirmed via Sina Finance article (2023-09-05) and 36Kr. Seven Seas Capital portfolio page lists the company. Shenzhen Capital Group press release confirms investment. Technology description from solar.in-en.com profile. Status as of 2026 uncertain — early stage with one disclosed round.
